title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Narayana Health Digital! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
